description: asyncio.gather 200 simultaneous requests, no SDK, no prefix warming, 200 independent file reads
note: Did not OOM or timeout. vLLM queued all 200 simultaneously. TTFT P50 grows from 0.208s (N=20) to 0.979s (N=200) — 4.7x increase from queue depth. Cache hit rate dropped from 79% to 63% because 200 unique no-prefix requests flood the cache.
